title: Hermes Agent + Ollama = 100% Private OS
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates building a private, locally-run operating system using Hermes Agent paired with Ollama to run language models like Qwen 3 without cloud dependencies. The setup prioritizes data privacy and user ownership by keeping all processing local while acknowledging tradeoffs in speed compared to cloud-based solutions.
